# Sufficient Statistics（十分統計量）

## 復習{-}

- Exponential family
- Statistic
- Likelihood


## Principles of data reduction{-}
- Sufficiency principle
- Likelihood principal
- Formal likelihood Principal* 
  - Formal sufficiency principle
  - Conditional principle
  - Formal likelihood principal
- Equivariance Principle*

## Sufficiency Principle

## Sufficient Statistics

## Ancillary Statistics

## Complete Statistics

## Basu' Theorem

## Likelihood Principle

## 応用：ベイズ推測法{-}

- Bayesian Markov chain Monte Carlo method
- STAN programming: https://mc-stan.org/docs/reference-manual/mcmc.html
- Using R: https://jtr13.github.io/cc20/a-basic-introduction-to-markov-chain-monte-carlo-method-in-r.html
